evals.prompt:
Convert this legacy AutoPilot script to SA Pro C#:

_GN_' Batch export planogram images
_PS_Create file list {ListName="ExportList"} {UseSubdirectories="False"}
_PS_ C:\Planograms\Coffee.psa
_PS_ C:\Planograms\Software.psa
_PS_End create file list
_PS_Use file list {ListName="ExportList"}
_PS_For projects
  _PS_Open project file {FileName=CurrentProject}
  _PS_Hide application
  _PS_For planograms
    _PS_Export image {LayoutFile="[CurrentView]"} {Page="1"} {ImageType="JPEG (*.jpg)"} {File="C:\Output\image.jpg"} {Resolution="150"}
  _PS_End planograms
  _PS_Show application
  _PS_Close project file
_PS_End projects
evals.expected_output: Valid SA Pro C# using SpacePlanning.ForProjects() with explicit file array, ForPlanograms() loop, ExportImage with JPEG method and width/height params, CloseProjectFile. HideApplication/ShowApplication must be omitted — conversion map marks them as not needed in SA Pro. Debugger.Launch() as first line of Run(). Should include comments preserving original _GN_' comment.

Valid SA Pro C# using StreamWriter for file output (ideally with using block), nested ForPlanograms/ForPositions loops, conditional on pos.Capacity==0, DeletePosition(), SaveProjectFile, CloseProjectFile.

evals.prompt:
Convert this legacy Floor Planning AutoPilot script to SA Pro C#:

_GN_' Export floorplan images for all store projects
_PF_Create file list {ListName="StoreList"} {UseSubdirectories="True"}
_PF_ C:\Stores\Store001.pfa
_PF_ C:\Stores\Store002.pfa
_PF_End create file list
_PF_Use file list {ListName="StoreList"}
_PF_For projects
  _PF_Open project file {FileName=CurrentProject}
  _PF_Hide application
  _PF_For floorplans
    _PF_Export image {LayoutFile="[CurrentView]"} {Page="1"} {ImageType="JPEG (*.jpg)"} {File="C:\FloorImages\store.jpg"}
  _PF_End floorplans
  _PF_Show application
  _PF_Save project file
  _PF_Close project file
_PF_End projects
evals.expected_output: Valid SA Pro C# using FloorPlanning.ForProjects() with explicit file array, ForFloorplans() loop, ExportImage with JPEG method, SaveProjectFile, CloseProjectFile. HideApplication/ShowApplication must be omitted — conversion map marks them as not needed in SA Pro. Namespace FloorMenuAssembly, class FloorMenuClass (Floor Planning script). Debugger.Launch() as first line of Run().
